assertions.title: Accessible from any browser without installation

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8020 in a headless Chromium browser

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. VAL-UI-001: Streamlit app loads with strategy selector, date pickers, and Run Backtest button. VAL-UI-003: Strategy dropdown lists 'chan_theory' as a selectable option. VAL-CROSS-002: App accessible from browser without any installation.
